# yandex_datalens_connection (Resource)

Manages a DataLens connection resource. For more information, see [the official documentation](https://yandex.cloud/ru/docs/datalens/operations/api-start).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The resource name. Changing this attribute forces recreation of the resource.
- `type` (String) The connection type. Currently supported: `ydb`. Changing this attribute forces recreation of the resource.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The resource description.
- `organization_id` (String) The organization ID for the DataLens instance. If not specified, the provider-level `organization_id` is used.
- `ydb` (Attributes) Configuration for YDB connection type. Must be specified when `type` is `ydb`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ydb))

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the resource.
- `id` (String) The resource identifier.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp of the resource.

<a id="nestedatt--ydb"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ydb`

Required:

- `cloud_id` (String) The cloud ID where the YDB database is located.
- `db_name` (String) The YDB database name (path).
- `folder_id` (String) The folder ID where the YDB database is located.
- `host` (String) The hostname of the YDB database endpoint.
- `port` (Number) The port number of the YDB database endpoint.
- `service_account_id` (String) The service account ID used to access the YDB database.

Optional:

- `auth_type` (String) The authentication type for the connection. Possible values: `anonymous`, `password`, `oauth`.
- `cache_ttl_sec` (Number) The cache TTL in seconds. `null` means default caching behavior.
- `data_export_forbidden` (String) Whether data export is forbidden. Possible values: `on`, `off`. Defaults to `off`.
- `delegation_is_set` (Boolean) Whether delegation is configured for the connection.
- `dir_path` (String) The directory path where the connection entry will be stored (used when connections are organized in folders instead of workbooks). Either `workbook_id` or `dir_path` must be specified. Changing this attribute forces recreation of the resource.
- `mdb_cluster_id` (String) The Managed Databases cluster ID (for managed YDB instances).
- `mdb_folder_id` (String) The folder ID for Managed Databases cluster lookup.
- `raw_sql_level` (String) The level of raw SQL queries allowed. Possible values: `off`, `subselect`, `template`, `dashsql`. Defaults to `off`.
- `ssl_ca` (String, Sensitive) The SSL CA certificate for secure connections.
- `ssl_enable` (String) Whether SSL is enabled for the connection. Possible values: `on`, `off`. Defaults to `on`.
- `token` (String, Sensitive) The OAuth token for authentication (used when `auth_type` is `oauth`). This is a write-only field and will not be returned by the API.
- `username` (String) The username for authentication (used when `auth_type` is `password`).
- `workbook_id` (String) The workbook ID where the connection will be created. Either `workbook_id` or `dir_path` must be specified. Changing this attribute forces recreation of the resource.
